nodes.name: bmad-kb.md
nodes.summary: Primary BMad knowledge base (809 lines) covering the full BMAD methodology, modular agent system, build system, dual web/IDE environment support, and workflow orchestration patterns.

nodes.name: brainstorming-techniques.md
nodes.summary: Reference data listing 20 structured brainstorming techniques (SCAMPER, Six Hats, Five Whys, etc.) used by the Analyst agent during ideation sessions.

nodes.name: elicitation-methods.md
nodes.summary: Reference data describing structured elicitation methods (reflective, structural, generative) agents use to draw out requirements and refine outputs interactively.

nodes.name: technical-preferences.md
nodes.summary: Placeholder file for user-defined technical patterns and preferences loaded by architect, dev, PM, and QA agents — currently empty for this project.

nodes.name: test-levels-framework.md
nodes.summary: Decision framework for choosing between unit, integration, and E2E test levels based on scenario characteristics, external dependencies, and coverage goals.

nodes.name: test-priorities-matrix.md
nodes.summary: Risk-based test prioritization matrix (P0-P3) guiding QA agents to focus testing effort on revenue-critical, security-sensitive, and regression-prone functionality first.
